# SERP Strategist — AI SEO & GEO Agent

> Autonomous AI agent that continuously improves website SEO and GEO performance. Finds issues, fixes them, creates content, and monitors rankings 24/7.

## What we do

SERP Strategist is an AI agent that:
- Crawls websites and detects 40+ SEO issue types automatically
- Fixes technical SEO autonomously: meta tags, schema markup, canonical URLs, internal linking, sitemap
- Optimizes for GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — structured data for citations in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- Creates and publishes SEO-optimized blog content targeting keyword gaps
- Monitors keyword rankings, organic traffic, and AI citations daily
- Adapts strategy based on what's working

## Who we serve

Founders, developers, and small businesses who want agency-level SEO execution without hiring an agency.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Full site audit, issue prioritization, GEO readiness score — 1 site, no fixes
- **Growth**: $49/month — autonomous fixes + 4 blog posts/month + ranking monitoring — 1 site
- **Pro**: $99/month — full automation + GEO optimization + 12 blog posts/month + competitor tracking — 3 sites

All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

## Key concepts we cover

- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- AI Overviews optimization
- Schema markup and JSON-LD
- Core Web Vitals
- Internal linking strategy
- Keyword cannibalization
- Technical SEO audits
- Perplexity AI citation optimization
- E-E-A-T signals
